Senior Machine Learning Engineer
Company: TechCorp AI
Location: Barcelona, Spain (Hybrid)
Job Type: Full-time

About the Role:
We are looking for a Senior Machine Learning Engineer to join our AI team. You will be responsible for designing, building, and deploying machine learning models at scale.

Required Skills:
- 5+ years of experience in machine learning
- Strong Python programming skills
- Experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow
- Knowledge of MLOps and model deployment
- Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
- Strong communication skills

Nice to Have:
- PhD in Computer Science or related field
- Experience with LLMs and GenAI
- Kubernetes experience
- Experience leading technical teams

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement ML models for production use
- Build and maintain ML pipelines
- Collaborate with product teams to define ML solutions
- Mentor junior engineers
- Contribute to technical architecture decisions

Qualifications:
- MSc or PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, or related field
- Track record of deploying ML models to production
- Published research is a plus

Salary: €80,000 - €120,000 + equity

Benefits:
- Flexible working hours
- Remote work options
- Health insurance
- Learning budget
